description: Block-form <match> payload binding (§18.0.1 / §18.1a). A click sets @load = Load.Loaded("report.pdf"); the <Loaded(name)> arm binds name and interpolates it. The snapshot stores the payload variant as { variant, data } (author-visible shape).
rationale: §18.0.1 a payload-bearing variant arm <Loaded(name)> destructures the payload into the arm scope; ${name} reads "report.pdf". The cell snapshot is the canonical { variant, data } representation.
